prompt: Prove in Lean 4 core: theorem hard_relcomp_identity_left {A B : Type} (R : A -> B -> Prop) (a : A) (b : B) (h : R a b) : Exists (fun x : A => And (x = a) (R x b)) := by sorry. A useful abstraction is an identity-on-left relation/composition view; avoid sorry.
formal_statement: theorem hard_relcomp_identity_left {A B : Type} (R : A -> B -> Prop) (a : A) (b : B) (h : R a b) : Exists (fun x : A => And (x = a) (R x b)) := by sorry

prompt: Prove in Lean 4 core: theorem hard_relcomp_identity_right {A B : Type} (R : A -> B -> Prop) (a : A) (b : B) (h : R a b) : Exists (fun y : B => And (R a y) (y = b)) := by sorry. A useful abstraction is an identity-on-right relation/composition view; avoid sorry.
formal_statement: theorem hard_relcomp_identity_right {A B : Type} (R : A -> B -> Prop) (a : A) (b : B) (h : R a b) : Exists (fun y : B => And (R a y) (y = b)) := by sorry

prompt: Prove in Lean 4 core: theorem hard_predicate_transport {A : Type} (P : A -> Prop) {x y : A} (hxy : x = y) (hx : P x) : P y := by sorry. A useful abstraction packages predicate transport across equality; avoid sorry.
formal_statement: theorem hard_predicate_transport {A : Type} (P : A -> Prop) {x y : A} (hxy : x = y) (hx : P x) : P y := by sorry
